name: Pan-seared beef
description: with sesame drizzle and kimchi fried rice

recipeIngredient.name: 1 pack of beef sirloin, 1 pack of steamed brown rice, 1 pot of Korean seasoning, 1 pot of sesame drizzle, 1 pot of kimchi, 1 sachet of sesame sprinkle, 1 pot of edamame and peas, 1 capsicum, 1 bag of bok choy
